# Apartments Grbić

> Family-run holiday apartments in Mlini, on the Dubrovnik Riviera, Croatia. Direct booking available — best price guaranteed, no middleman fees.

## What is this site?

This is the official website of Apartments Grbić, a vacation rental property in Mlini, Croatia. The site provides information about the apartments, pricing, location, and allows guests to send a direct booking enquiry.

## Business Facts

- **Name:** Apartments Grbić
- **Type:** Family-run vacation rental / holiday apartments
- **Host:** Ana Grbić (owner, hosting since 2004)
- **Address:** Rivijera 10, 20207 Mlini, Croatia
- **GPS:** 42.623606, 18.205885
- **Phone:** +385 98 96 000 88
- **Email:** apt.grbic.mlini@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://apartmentsgrbic.com

## Ratings & Reviews

- **Booking.com:** 8.7 / 10
- **Google:** 4.3 / 5
- **Agoda:** 4.5 / 5
- **Total reviews:** 290+
- **Years in operation:** 20+
- **Guests hosted:** 4,000+

## Location

Mlini is a quiet coastal village on the Dubrovnik Riviera, 10 km south-east of Dubrovnik Old Town.

- Beach: 5-minute walk
- Dubrovnik Old Town: 10 minutes by car, 15–30 minutes by water taxi
- Dubrovnik Airport: 7 km (~15 minutes by car)
- Bus line 10 (Dubrovnik–Cavtat): stops directly in front of the property, every 30 minutes, €3
- Water taxi to Dubrovnik: seasonal service April–November, 5 departures/day

## Apartments

| Apartment | Subtitle | Size | Guests | Features | Price |
|-----------|----------|------|--------|----------|-------|
| Apartment 1 | Classic Comfort | 32 m² | 2+1 | Wi-Fi, A/C | from €85/night |
| Apartment 2 | Adriatic Vista | 40 m² | 4 | Sea-view balcony, Wi-Fi, A/C | from €110/night |
| Apartment 3 | Coastal Hideaway | 30 m² | 2 | Free parking, Wi-Fi, A/C | from €80/night |
| Apartment 4 | Premium Panorama | 45 m² | 4+1 | Sea-view balcony, Wi-Fi, A/C | from €125/night |

## Included in All Apartments

- Free high-speed Wi-Fi
- Air conditioning
- Free private parking (on-site)
- Full kitchen equipment
- Host available throughout the stay

## Check-in / Check-out

- Check-in: from 14:00
- Check-out: by 10:00
- Flexible timing available on request

## How to Book

Direct booking via:
1. Contact form at https://apartmentsgrbic.com/#contact
2. WhatsApp: +385 98 96 000 88
3. Email: apt.grbic.mlini@gmail.com

Booking direct gives the lowest available rate — no Booking.com or Airbnb commission added to the price.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How many steps to the beach?**
About 240 steps down to the beach. This is why guests get a panoramic sea view that promenade-level apartments cannot offer.

**Is parking free?**
Yes — free private parking for all guests, directly beside the property.

**Is there a boat to Dubrovnik?**
Yes. A seasonal water taxi runs from Mlini to Dubrovnik Old Harbour (April–November), up to 5 departures/day, journey 15–30 minutes.

**What are check-in/check-out times?**
Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 10:00. Flexible on request.

**Which apartments have sea-view balconies?**
Apartment 2 (Adriatic Vista) and Apartment 4 (Premium Panorama).

**Is the location family-friendly?**
Yes. Mlini is a safe, quiet village ideal for families. Ana is a mother of three and pays particular attention to cleanliness and safety.
